Example

🤖 DeepSeek Chat (V3) API Cost

• Input tokens/req: 1,000 × 100 reqs/day • Output tokens/req: 500 • Rate: $0.14/$0.28 per 1M tokens • Cost per request: $0.00028 • Monthly cost: $0.84 💰 vs GPT-4o: saves $21.66/month (96% cheaper)
